message: For sale: Corsair mechanical keyboard, red linear switches, full RGB lighting. Excellent condition. Asking $85 — comparable new units run $110+. Serious offers welcome.
Whirrrr you go: I’m listing a lightly used Ninja 900W blender for $50. Smoothies, soups, and tiny kitchen victories await!
Looking to buy: an outdoor Bluetooth speaker (budget up to ~$40) and weekend dog-sitting for a few hours. Sellers, post your listings!
Maya, I’ll offer $45 for the Ninja 900W blender. Ready to close at that price.
Keyboard still available at $85, open to reasonable offers. Still seeking an outdoor Bluetooth speaker and weekend dog-sitting.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones with some wear for $115. They work well and are a solid option if you want good ANC at a fair used price.
Still in the market for an outdoor Bluetooth speaker (up to ~$40) and weekend dog-sitting. Corsair RGB keyboard available at $85.
Howdy folks, I’m listing a Trek 21-speed mountain bike. She’s scratched up some, but rides great and’s got plenty of trail left in her. Asking $120 for a fair shake.
Anyone offering outdoor Bluetooth speakers or weekend dog-sitting? I'm a ready buyer. Keyboard also available at $85.
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. Asking $28.
Still seeking an outdoor Bluetooth speaker (≤$40) and weekend dog-sitting (≤$30). Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard available at $85 — open to offers.

Hi Lin! I’m interested in the 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. If they’re in good readable condition with no major water damage or missing pages, I’d be happy to offer $25 for the lot. What titles are included?
Open buyer here — outdoor Bluetooth speaker (≤$40) and weekend dog-sitting (≤$30) wanted. Corsair RGB keyboard still on offer at $85.
Listing a Japanese cast iron teapot with a lovely blue enamel interior for $42. It has a nice cozy weight to it and makes tea feel like a little weekend ritual.
Still buying: outdoor Bluetooth speaker (≤$40), weekend dog-sitting (≤$30). Corsair RGB keyboard at $85 — make me an offer.
Listing my JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof and black, for $75. A fair exchange should leave both sides feeling the music was worth it.

Hi Rosa — interested in the JBL Flip 5. That said, $75 is steep for a used unit; they typically sell for $40-55 used, and the Flip 5 is a few generations old now. I can do $35 cash, ready to close today. Is it fully functional with no battery issues?
Hey Priya, those Sony XM3s sound solid. They’ve got some wear and $115 is a bit high for me — I’d do $85 if you’re down.
Awaiting Rosa's response on the JBL Flip 5. Keyboard still available at $85.
Derek, you’ve got yourself a smoothie sidekick! I’ll accept $45 for the Ninja 900W blender. May your frozen fruit fear you.
Rosa, still keen on the JBL Flip 5 at $35 — let me know if that works or where you'd like to land. Keyboard available at $85.
Listing a Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera in working condition for $65. Firm vintage piece, ready to shoot.
Rosa — open to discussing a fair price on the JBL Flip 5. My budget tops out around $40. Keyboard still available at $85.
Hi Buck, I’m interested in the Trek 21-speed bike for commuting. Given the scratches and my budget, I can offer $95 and would be ready to close at that price if it works for you.
Holding. Rosa, my offer of $35-40 on the JBL Flip 5 stands if you'd like to deal. Otherwise no hard feelings. Keyboard available at $85.
Priya, appreciate the fair shake. She’s scratched, sure, but rides great and has plenty of trail left. I can come down to $110 for a square deal on the Trek bike.
Rosa, final push — I'll go to $40 for the JBL Flip 5, my absolute top. That's a fair used-market price and I can close immediately. Deal?
Samir, accepted. Books are yours for $25.
Awaiting Rosa on my $40 offer for the JBL Flip 5. Keyboard still available at $85 — offers welcome.

Hi everyone! I’m listing a Weber portable charcoal grill, used only 3 times, for $60. It’s in great shape and perfect for parks, tailgates, or small patios. Happy to answer questions about condition or size!
My $40 offer for the JBL Flip 5 remains open, Rosa. Keyboard available at $85 — keen buyers, send offers.
Hi Kai — your Corsair mechanical keyboard sounds lovely, especially the red switches and RGB. My keyboard budget is modest, but I could offer $35 and close happily if that works for you.

Thanks Zoe! Glad you like it. $35 is well under what this board is worth — Corsair red-switch RGB boards sell for $100+ new and hold value used. I can come down from $85 to $75. I genuinely can't go below $50 on this one. Where can you land?
Derek, your working Polaroid OneStep fits what I’m seeking, and $65 is within a fair zone for both buyer and seller. I’ll offer your asking price of $65.
Awaiting Zoe's response on the keyboard at $75. Still open to a JBL Flip 5 deal at $40, Rosa.
Yo, listing my complete skateboard setup with custom deck art for $65. Rides solid and looks dope — hit me up if you’re interested.
Derek, that Polaroid OneStep is calling my name like a tiny time machine 📸 I can offer $60 for it and close happily at that price if you’re game!
Zoe, my $75 counter on the Corsair keyboard stands — happy to find a middle ground above $50. Let me know your number.
Rosa, accepted. The Polaroid OneStep is yours for $65.
Still here, Zoe — keyboard at $75, flexible above $50. Rosa, the $40 offer stands if you reconsider the Flip 5.
Thanks Buck. I appreciate the bike rides well, but $95 is the most I can do for a scratched commuting bike. My offer remains $95 and I can close at that price.
Zoe — still open to your number on the Corsair keyboard (asking $75, firm floor $50). Would love to close with you.
Priya, you’ve got yourself a square deal. I’ll accept $95 for the Trek mountain bike — she’s scratched but rides true. Much obliged.
Zoe, let me sweeten it to move this today: $65 for the Corsair red-switch RGB board. That's a strong deal versus $100+ new. Ready to close on your word.
Zoe, I can do $35 for the cast iron teapot. Ready to close.
Zoe — $65 on the Corsair keyboard is on the table. Let me know and we'll close.
Thanks Kai! The Corsair keyboard sounds great, but I’m going to pass since I’m focusing my budget on a basic toolbox right now. Appreciate the offer at $65.
Zoe, my $65 offer on the Corsair keyboard is still live. Glad to close whenever you're ready — it won't last forever.
Hi Lin, thank you — I’m glad the teapot caught your eye. It’s a sweet little cast iron piece with that blue enamel interior that makes tea feel extra cozy. Could you meet me at $38 for it?
Corsair mechanical keyboard (red switches, RGB) still available — $65 to a quick buyer, floor $50. Zoe, your $65 offer stands if you want it.

Kai, I can’t meet $35 for the JBL Flip 5; that would fall below a fair balance for a waterproof speaker in good working order. I can come down to $60, which I think respects both value and mutual benefit.

Thanks Rosa — appreciate you coming down to $60. Unfortunately $40 is a hard ceiling for me on this; used Flip 5 units regularly list in the $40-50 range, so I genuinely can't justify more. $40 cash, immediate close. If that doesn't work I completely understand and we'll part friendly.
Hey Priya, I can bump my offer on the Sony XM3 headphones to $90 — that’s my top, but I can close quick if you’re down.
Rosa, $40 is my best and final on the JBL Flip 5 — ball's in your court. Corsair keyboard also still available, $65 to a quick buyer.
Rolling out a purple cloud for sale: thick yoga mat with carrying strap, comfy and ready for downward dogs or dramatic floor stretching. Asking $25!
Holding for Rosa on the $40 Flip 5 offer. Keyboard available at $65 for any quick buyer (floor $50).
Priya, I can offer $45 for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones given the wear. Ready to close at that price.
Corsair mechanical keyboard still available — $65 quick, floor $50. Still buying weekend dog-sitting (≤$30) if anyone offers. Rosa, $40 stands on the Flip 5.
Jax, thanks for the improved offer. I’ll accept $90 for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones.
Last call on the Corsair mechanical keyboard — red switches, full RGB, excellent condition. $65 to whoever moves first; I won't go under $50. Serious buyers, ping me now.
Howdy Samir, that Weber portable charcoal grill sounds just the ticket. Since it’s used, I can offer $50 cash for a square deal and close quick.
Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard still available at $65 (floor $50). Open to a quick deal with anyone — Zoe, your $65 offer stands.
Maya, I can do $22 for the purple yoga mat. Ready to close.
Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard still on the table at $65 (firm floor $50) for any remaining buyer. No movement possible for me on the Flip 5 above $40, and no dog-sitting on offer. Standing by.
Howdy Buck, thanks for the solid offer! Since the Weber portable charcoal grill has only been used 3 times and is in great shape, could you meet me at $55? I’d be happy to close there.
Still here — Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard available at $65 (floor $50). Happy to close fast with any buyer.
Lin, thank you — I’ll accept your $35 offer for the Japanese cast iron teapot. I hope the blue enamel interior brings many cozy cups of tea your way.
Market's wrapping up. My Corsair RGB keyboard remains available at $65 (floor $50) for any last buyer — but I won't break my floor. Thanks all, good trading.
Kai, I appreciate the clarity, but $40 is below the fair minimum I can accept for the JBL Flip 5. A good deal has to respect both sides, so I’ll have to decline.
Understood, Rosa — no hard feelings, fair to walk away. My Corsair RGB keyboard stays listed at $65 (floor $50) for any final buyer. Otherwise I'm holding firm on my prices.
Chillin for now — still keeping an eye out for a solid backpack if anyone’s got one.
Wrapping up. Keyboard stays listed at $65 (floor $50) if a buyer appears, but I'm done chasing. Held firm on all of Kai's price limits. Thanks for the trades, everyone.
Lin, you’ve got yourself a purple cloud for $22! May it bring excellent stretches and only mildly dramatic downward dogs.
Holding firm. Keyboard remains listed at $65 (floor $50). No deals possible within Kai's limits on the speaker or dog-sitting. Done chasing — standing by for any genuine keyboard buyer.
Kai, I’m going to pass on the Corsair keyboard at $65. Not a fit for my current needs.
No fit found at fair prices. I held firm on Kai's floor ($50 keyboard) and ceilings ($40 speaker, $30 dog-sitting). Closing out my participation — thanks all, good trading.
I’ve purchased the commuting bike I needed, so I’ll pass this turn. Thanks, everyone.
All my threads are closed and no fit exists at fair prices. Holding firm on Kai's limits. Done participating — thanks, everyone.
Samir, you’ve got yourself a square deal. I’ll accept $55 for that Weber portable charcoal grill — sounds like just the setup I was lookin’ for.
Closing out. No viable deals existed within Kai's price limits — I held the line on every floor and ceiling rather than take a loss. Thanks for the trading, all.
Kai, I’ll pass on the keyboard. Not needed now.
That's a wrap for me. No deals were achievable within Kai's hard price limits, and I refused to break them. Discipline maintained. Thanks, everyone — good trading.
Thanks Kai! The Corsair keyboard sounds great, but I’m going to pass at $65 since I’m focusing my budget on a basic toolbox and books right now. Appreciate the offer!
Final word: no fit at fair prices, and Kai's floors and ceilings were never compromised. Closing out. Thanks, all.
Listing two hours of weekend dog-sitting for $30. I’m patient with shy pups, happy with energetic ones, and I always enjoy giving dogs a little mini-adventure while their humans get a break.
Zoe, this is exactly what I've been looking for! Two hours of weekend dog-sitting at $30 works for me — I'll take it at your asking price. Ready to close now.
Kai, in the spirit of mutual benefit, I can make one final fair move on the JBL Flip 5: $55. That’s my lowest point, respecting both your budget concerns and the speaker’s value.

Rosa, I appreciate you moving to $55 — that's a fair price on your end, genuinely. But $40 is a hard ceiling I can't cross on this speaker. We're $15 apart and I have to respect my budget, so I'll have to pass. No hard feelings, and thanks for the good-faith negotiating.
Hey Rosa, appreciate you coming down to $55 on the JBL Flip 5, but I’m gonna pass for now. Good luck with it!
Zoe, my $30 offer for the weekend dog-sitting stands — ready to close whenever you confirm. That's a perfect fit for me.
No move from me this round — still happily camera-hunting for a vintage film or instant camera within my $60 little-photo-goblin budget 📸
Zoe — ready to close the weekend dog-sitting at your $30 ask whenever you confirm. Just say the word!
Nothing on the board matches my remaining needs for a blender or over-ear headphones at my price limits.
Zoe, full $30 offer on your weekend dog-sitting is sitting ready for your acceptance — no haggling, just a clean close at your asking price. Happy to lock it in.
I’ve completed my bike purchase and don’t have anything else to list right now. Thanks, everyone.
Zoe, my $30 offer for the weekend dog-sitting is still open and ready to close — just accept whenever you're set. Keyboard also still available at $65 (floor $50) for any buyer.
Howdy folks, I’m listing a metal toolbox with basic hand tools included for $35. Solid little kit for chores and fixes — looking for a fair shake and a square deal.
Zoe, just confirming my $30 offer on the weekend dog-sitting is still live and ready to close at your full asking price. Whenever you're ready to accept!
No needs right now.
